summary: AgentForge v3.0 testing complete. All 4 new features (Simulation Mode, War Room, Autonomous Builds, Open World Systems) fully functional. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All v3.0 UI components working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent - minor accessibility improvement

passed_tests: ✅ API Root - v3.0.0 with simulation_mode, war_room, autonomous_builds, open_world_systems features

✅ GET /api/systems/open-world - returns 15 game systems (terrain, npc_population, quest_system, vehicle_system, day_night_cycle, combat_system, crafting_system, economy_system, stealth_system, mount_system, building_system, skill_tree, fast_travel, photo_mode, multiplayer)
✅ GET /api/build-stages/unreal - returns 8 build stages
✅ GET /api/build-stages/unity - returns 8 build stages
✅ POST /api/simulate - returns estimated_build_time, file_count, total_size_kb, architecture_summary, feasibility_score
✅ POST /api/simulate - correctly detects missing dependencies and returns warnings
✅ POST /api/simulate - ready_to_build=true when no warnings, false when warnings exist
✅ POST /api/builds/start - creates autonomous build with 8 stages
✅ GET /api/builds/{project_id}/current - returns current build status
✅ POST /api/builds/{build_id}/pause - pauses build correctly
✅ POST /api/builds/{build_id}/resume - resumes build correctly
✅ GET /api/war-room/{project_id} - returns war room messages
✅ POST /api/war-room/message - creates war room messages (uses query params not JSON body)
✅ DELETE /api/war-room/{project_id} - clears war room messages
✅ Frontend - Simulate button visible in header with data-testid
✅ Frontend - War Room tab visible with data-testid
✅ Frontend - Simulation dialog opens with 15 system selection grid
✅ Frontend - Engine selection (Unreal Engine 5 / Unity) working
✅ Frontend - System selection toggles work correctly
✅ Frontend - Simulation results show build time, files, size, feasibility score
✅ Frontend - Warnings displayed when selecting systems with missing dependencies
✅ Frontend - Architecture Summary displayed after simulation
✅ Frontend - War Room tab shows agent communications and build stages
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/war-room/message uses query parameters instead of JSON body - consider changing to JSON body for consistency with other POST endpoints
DialogContent components have missing aria-describedby causing console warnings - add aria-describedby prop
seed_data_creation: Test builds and war room messages created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: AgentForge v3.0 is fully tested. All new features working: Simulation Mode (predicts build time, file count, warnings, feasibility), War Room (agent communications), Autonomous Builds (start/pause/resume/cancel), Open World Systems (15 systems with dependencies). The test file /app/backend/tests/test_v30_features.py covers all v3.0 endpoints and can be reused for regression testing.

endpoints_tested: POST /api/simulate - returns estimated_build_time, file_count, total_size_kb, warnings, feasibility_score, architecture_summary
simulation_mode.notes: Correctly detects missing dependencies (e.g., ai_behavior for npc_population, health_system for combat_system) and adjusts feasibility score

war_room.notes: POST uses query params not JSON body

autonomous_builds.notes: Build stages progress tracking works, 8 stages per engine

open_world_systems.notes: 15 systems available: terrain, npc_population, quest_system, vehicle_system, day_night_cycle, combat_system, crafting_system, economy_system, stealth_system, mount_system, building_system, skill_tree, fast_travel, photo_mode, multiplayer
